title: Soul Calibur
prompt:
Original illustration inspired by a retro Fighting game.

A lone martial artist silhouette in an arena or duel space with impact energy, banners, and confrontation framing, holding a focused pre-fight stance in a charged arena.

Game metadata:
- Title: Soul Calibur
- Platform: Dreamcast
- Release year: 1999
- Secondary genre signal: Combat

Visual focus:
- one clear subject
- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second

Style:
- clean futurist editorial art, airy space, modern arcade tone, bright accent lighting
- pixel art or stylized rendering depending on platform
- clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations
- limited color palette when relevant

Mood:
- intense, dramatic, charged

Composition:
- one subject slightly left of center, with a clean silhouette and a world behind it that explains the genre immediately
- simple background
- no clutter

Important:
- Do NOT replicate any official character, logo, or design
- Do NOT imitate exact game assets
- Must feel original but clearly inspired by the game's genre and atmosphere

Output:
- high clarity
- strong contrast
- minimal noise
- no text
- no watermark
negative_prompt: avoid any mascot-like facial or costume elements, no official character likeness, no copyrighted costume replication, no original enemy designs, no game logo, no UI elements, no screenshot recreation, no exact box art composition, no branded symbols, no text, no abstract shapes, no decorative geometry, no empty background
